prompt_text: Recommended AI tooling tools for AI engineering teams building and deploying LLM-powered products companies
response:
# AI Engineering Tooling Stack for LLM Products

## **Core Development & Experimentation**

### Model Development
- **Jupyter/VS Code + Extensions** – IDE foundation
- **Weights & Biases (W&B)** – experiment tracking, model versioning
- **MLflow** – open-source ML lifecycle management
- **Hugging Face Hub** – model hosting, discovery, versioning
- **LangSmith** – LLM app debugging & monitoring

### Prompting & Experimentation
- **Promptfoo** – prompt testing & comparison
- **Braintrust** – evals and monitoring
- **OpenAI Evals** – evaluation framework
- **DSPy** – systematic prompt optimization

---

## **LLM Application Frameworks**

- **LangChain** – flexible chains/agents (Python/JS)
- **LlamaIndex** – data indexing for RAG
- **Semantic Kernel** – Microsoft's orchestration layer
- **Agent frameworks** – AutoGen, CrewAI for multi-agent systems

---

## **Data & Vector Infrastructure**

### Vector Databases
- **Pinecone** – fully managed, easiest to start
- **Weaviate** – open-source, feature-rich
- **Qdrant** – high performance, scalable
- **Milvus** – open-source, large-scale
- **PostgreSQL + pgvector** – simple, integrated

### Data Processing
- **Apache Airflow** – orchestration
- **dbt** – data transformation
- **Ray** – distributed processing

---

## **Evaluation & Quality**

- **Anthropic Evals** – structured evaluation
- **RAGAS** – RAG-specific metrics
- **Arize** – model monitoring in production
- **Galileo** – LLM data quality
- **Scale AI** – data labeling + eval infrastructure

---

## **Deployment & Infrastructure**

### Serving
- **vLLM** – high-throughput LLM serving
- **Ray Serve** – scalable model serving
- **BentoML** – model packaging & deployment
- **Hugging Face Inference Endpoints** – managed inference

### Cloud Platforms
- **Lambda Labs, Together AI** – GPU infrastructure
- **AWS SageMaker** – enterprise ML ops
- **Modal** – serverless GPU compute
- **Replicate** – model API marketplace

---

## **Monitoring & Production**

- **Datadog/New Relic** – infrastructure monitoring
- **LangSmith** – LLM-specific tracing
- **Humanloop** – feedback loops & RLHF
- **Literal AI** – prompt monitoring
- **OpenLLMetry** – observability standard

---

## **Security & Compliance**

- **Lakera** – prompt injection detection
- **Robust Intelligence** – adversarial testing
- **Hugging Face SafetyKit** – content filtering
- **Pydantic** – data validation

---

## **Team Collaboration & Docs**

- **GitHub** – version control, workflows
- **Notion/Confluence** – documentation
- **Slack** – alerts & notifications
- **Linear/Jira** – project management

---

## **Recommended Stack by Stage**

### **Early Stage (MVP)**
- LangChain + OpenAI API
- Pinecone or pgvector
- Weights & Biases
- Hugging Face spaces for demo
- Promptfoo for evals

### **Growth (Scaling)**
- Above + vLLM for self-hosted
- Arize/Braintrust for monitoring
- Airflow for data pipelines
- Ray for distributed workloads
- Formal eval suite (Braintrust/Scale)

### **Enterprise**
- Full stack above
- SageMaker or Kubernetes
- Advanced security (Lakera, RobustIntel)
- Compliance tooling
- Dedicated ops infrastructure

---

## **Key Selection Criteria**

✅ **Latency requirements** → vLLM vs API  
✅ **Cost sensitivity** → Self-hosted vs managed  
✅ **Team size** → Complexity trade-offs  
✅ **Model ownership** → Proprietary vs open-source  
✅ **Compliance needs** → On-prem vs cloud
